# OSLAdjustMarksUPP

**Type Alias**

Defines a data type for the universal procedure pointer for the `OSLAdjustMarksProcPtr` callback function pointer.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias OSLAdjustMarksUPP = OSLAdjustMarksProcPtr
```

## Discussion

For a description of an adjust marks callback function, see [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/osladjustmarksprocptr].
